description: diffaero/utils/math.py 包含18个数学工具函数：rk4, EulerIntegral, quaternion转换, 旋转矩阵等。当前 diffaero_newton 直接依赖 pytorch3d，需要评估是否需要完整迁移这些函数。

close_reason: Completed: obstacle SHAC standalone actor-update no longer triggers the inplace autograd failure on current main. Verified with pytest diffaero_newton/tests/test_obstacle_training.py::TestIntegration::test_training_iteration -q and the full obstacle suite.
description: QA validation found that diffaero_newton/tests/test_obstacle_training.py::TestIntegration::test_training_iteration fails when SHAC performs a standalone update on obstacle training, raising a PyTorch inplace autograd error during actor backward. This is a source-level differentiable training bug, not a test-layer issue. Repair SHAC/obstacle runtime so a standalone training iteration can be restored as a passing GPU quality gate.
title: Fix SHAC standalone obstacle update inplace autograd regression
